mapper.select: SELECT pb.id, pb.create_at, pb.update_at, pb.status, pb.note, pb.user_id, pt.price, pt.pitch_id, pt.time_slot_id, p.name as pitch_name, p.address, pt1.name as type, ts.start_time, ts.end_time FROM pitch_booking pb join pitch_time pt on pb.pitch_time_pitch_id = pt.pitch_id and pb.pitch_time_time_slot_id = pt.time_slot_id Join pitch p on p.id = pb.pitch_time_pitch_id join pitch_type pt1 on p.pitch_type_id = pt1.id join time_slot ts on pt.time_slot_id = ts.id where pb.id = #{id}

SELECT pb.id, pb.create_at, pb.update_at, pb.status, pb.note, pb.user_id, pt.price, pt.pitch_id, pt.time_slot_id, p.name as pitch_name, p.address, pt1.name as type, ts.start_time, ts.end_time FROM pitch_booking pb join pitch_time pt on pb.pitch_time_pitch_id = pt.pitch_id and pb.pitch_time_time_slot_id = pt.time_slot_id Join pitch p on p.id = pb.pitch_time_pitch_id join pitch_type pt1 on p.pitch_type_id = pt1.id join time_slot ts on pt.time_slot_id = ts.id where pb.user_id = #{user_id}
mapper.insert: insert into pitch_booking (status, note, pitch_time_pitch_id, pitch_time_time_slot_id, user_id) value(#{status},#{note},#{pitch_id},#{time_slot_id},#{user_id})
mapper.update: UPDATE pitch_booking SET update_at = #{update_at}, status = #{status}, note = #{note}, pitch_time_pitch_id = #{pitch_id}, pitch_time_time_slot_id = #{time_slot_id} WHERE id = #{id}
